creator: ryan@sasknow.com
text:
Hello...

Is there anything else required, here, or are we just waiting for a
friendly committer? :-)  I've OK'd this with the current (old)
maintainer. Note that this update fixes some known bugs, so it would
be nice to get the patches applied to the ports tree.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/32915

Thanks,
- Ryan
